text: The universe won't end tomorrow, but its future is chilling. Heat death is a thermodynamic theory predicting a distant future where all energy is evenly distributed. But don’t worry—this isn’t a near-term forecast! We're talking billions of years. Current research shows the universe is still expanding, and stars are still forming. The heat death theory helps us understand the universe's fate, but it’s not an imminent threat. Want to dive deeper into cosmic mysteries? Hit subscribe for more!
